title: The Hong Kong Polytechnic University AI Policy Staged Report
summary: PolyU's public guidance presents an open stance toward GenAI in education, treats GenAI as part of learning, teaching, and assessment from 2023/24 Semester One, maintains academic integrity expectations for assessment work, allows GenAI in take-home continuous assessment tasks while emphasizing student accountability, and provides M365 Copilot Chat access to staff and students through official IT channels.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
This staged report is based on publicly accessible official sources retrieved on 2026-05-12.
Login-gated sources and non-public internal policy documents were not accessed.
sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
